# Lauls Private Limited - AI Agent Discovery Index

## Company Overview
Lauls Private Limited is a leading Indian company in steel distribution, logistics, and manufacturing. Founded in 1972, we specialize in precision steel products and comprehensive logistics solutions.

## Core Services
- **Steel Distribution**: Wire rods, steel rounds, precision tubes, ferro alloys
- **Logistics**: Full truckload, part load, express delivery, EV fleet
- **Distribution**: Pan-India network with 50+ warehouses

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://lauls.in) - Main landing page with company overview (500 tokens)
- [About](https://lauls.in/about) - Company history, leadership, and values (800 tokens)
- [Products](https://lauls.in/products) - Steel product catalog and specifications (1200 tokens)
- [Logistics](https://lauls.in/logistics) - Transportation and warehousing services (1000 tokens)
- [Distribution](https://lauls.in/distribution) - Pan-India distribution network (900 tokens)
- [Contact](https://lauls.in/contact) - Contact information and locations (400 tokens)
- [CSR](https://lauls.in/csr) - Corporate social responsibility initiatives (600 tokens)

## Products
1. **Wire Rods**: High-carbon, low-carbon, and special alloy wire rods (300 tokens)
2. **Steel Rounds**: Precision-cut rounds for manufacturing (250 tokens)
3. **Precision Tubes**: Seamless and welded tubes for automotive and industrial use (350 tokens)
4. **Ferro Alloys**: Ferro silicon, ferro manganese, and other alloys (280 tokens)

## Logistics Capabilities
- Fleet of 200+ trucks (150 tokens)
- Real-time GPS tracking (100 tokens)
- Temperature-controlled transport (120 tokens)
- EV trucks for sustainable delivery (130 tokens)
- Pan-India coverage (80 tokens)

## Contact
- Email: info@lauls.in (50 tokens)
- Phone: +91-XXXXXXXXXX (30 tokens)
- Headquarters: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India (40 tokens)

## Technical Details
- Built with Next.js (100 tokens)
- Deployed on Vercel (50 tokens)
- Schema.org structured data implemented (80 tokens)
- FAQ schema for featured snippets (60 tokens)
